name: World Info | docs.ST.app
snippet:
World Info (also known as Lorebooks or Memory Books) is a powerful tool available in ST to insert prompts dynamically into your chat to help guide the AI.
It functions like a dynamic dictionary that only inserts relevant information from World Info entries when keywords associated with the entries are present in the message text.

name: World Info System | SillyTavern/SillyTavern | DeepWiki
snippet: The World Info System provides dynamic context injection by scanning chat history and character data for keywords, then inserting matching entries into the prompt.
